title: Two-factor verification codes aren't arriving
text: If your verification code isn't arriving by text, make sure the phone number on your profile is current and has signal, then request a new code (each code expires after 10 minutes). Codes can be delayed by carrier issues, so wait a minute before requesting another to avoid invalidating the first. If you use an authenticator app, confirm your phone's clock is set to update automatically, since a wrong clock makes app codes fail. You can also switch verification methods or update your number in Security settings.
